status.description: Use ok for a command result or clarify for a question.

command.description: Non-null only for status ok; null for status clarify.

explanation.description: Non-null only for status ok; null for status clarify.

assumptions.description: Non-null only for status ok; null for status clarify.

riskHint.description: Non-null only for status ok; null for status clarify.

question.description: Non-null only for status clarify; null for status ok.
